---
title: "Home"
format:
  html:
    toc: false
---


::: {.portfolio-banner}
::: {.portfolio-banner-inner}
## Welcome to My Portfolio

A curated space to present my academic journey, project work, professional interests, and the experiences that continue to shape my growth.
:::
:::

::: {.home-hero-box}
:::: {.home-about-panel}
::: {.home-about-text}
# Sophia Sufei Chen

✨ Final-Year Business Studies Student | Business Analytics | Marketing Strategy | Process Improvement

🔗 Let’s connect on LinkedIn and explore my academic background, business interests, and professional journey.

[About Me](about.html){.home-pill .home-pill-main}
[Projects](projects.html){.home-pill}
[CV](cv.html){.home-pill .home-pill-cv}
[LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/sophiasufei-chen-389591233){.home-pill}
:::

::: {.home-about-image}
![](images/profile.jpg)
:::
::::
:::



## Explore More

:::: {.preview-entry-grid}
::: {.preview-entry-card .preview-card-about}
### 🌷 About Me
A closer introduction to my academic background, personal story, and the experiences that shape who I am beyond the title on the page.

[Enter About](about.html){.preview-entry-link}
:::

::: {.preview-entry-card .preview-card-projects}
### 📁 Projects
Explore coursework, practical analysis, and business-focused project work that reflects both learning and application.

[View Projects](projects.html){.preview-entry-link}
:::

::: {.preview-entry-card .preview-card-skills}
### ✨ Skill Preview
A hidden preview page that highlights how I think, work, and grow — from business analysis to communication and process improvement.

[Open Skill Preview](skill-preview.html){.preview-entry-link}
:::

::: {.preview-entry-card .preview-card-reflection}
### 🌙 Reflection
Read what I learned through building this portfolio, completing projects, and shaping a clearer direction for my future.

[Read Reflection](reflection.html){.preview-entry-link}
:::
::::


## Profile Highlights

:::: {.home-card-grid}
::: {.home-feature-card}
### Business Analytics
Academic focus on structured analysis, decision-making, and business insight.
:::

::: {.home-feature-card}
### Marketing Planning
Experience developing customer-focused strategy and value propositions.
:::

::: {.home-feature-card}
### Accounting & ACCA
Practical finance exposure through internship experience and ACCA studies.
:::

::: {.home-feature-card}
### Process Improvement
Strong interest in operational efficiency, cost analysis, and profitability.
:::
::::

:::: {.home-contact-grid}
::: {.home-contact-card}
### 📫 Contact
✉ chensophia0921@gmail.com
:::

::: {.home-contact-card}
### 📱 Phone
+353 0876535880
:::
::::


## Connect With Me

<form id="connectForm" class="connect-form">
<div class="connect-grid">
<div class="connect-field">
<label for="visitor-name">Name</label>
<input type="text" id="visitor-name" name="name" placeholder="Enter your name" required>
</div>

<div class="connect-field">
<label for="visitor-email">Email</label>
<input type="email" id="visitor-email" name="email" placeholder="Enter your email" required>
</div>
</div>

<button type="submit" class="connect-btn">Connect Me</button>

<div id="connectModal" class="connect-modal">
  <div class="connect-modal-box">
    <p>I have received your connect invitation 📧</p>
    <button type="button" onclick="closeConnectModal()">Close</button>
  </div>
</div>

<script>
const connectForm = document.getElementById("connectForm");
const connectModal = document.getElementById("connectModal");

function closeConnectModal() {
  connectModal.style.display = "none";
}

if (connectForm) {
  connectForm.addEventListener("submit", function (e) {
    e.preventDefault();
    connectForm.reset();
    connectModal.style.display = "flex";
  });
}

window.addEventListener("click", function(e) {
  if (e.target === connectModal) {
    closeConnectModal();
  }
});
</script>
</form>
